page_0293.png: Cover photo for Alarms and Events Visualization module — stock image of people working at computers in a training/classroom setting, used as a decorative module header
page_0300.png: Two HMI process gauges: a vertical pressure gauge reading 169.00 Pa and a vertical liquid level gauge reading 85.00 EU with a purple alarm indicator and Manual mode symbol
page_0301.png: Edit Animations dialog for Alarm Border configuration — shows Standard vs Customized Alarm-Urgency References with fields for InAlarmSource, AckedSource, ModeSource, SeveritySource, and ShelvedSource bound to Me.PV attributes
page_0302.png: Alarms and Events configuration dialog — Alarms tab showing four severity levels (Critical 1-250, High 251-500, Medium 501-750, Low 751-999) with Shelve/Historize toggles, Modes section (Inhibited/Disabled, Silenced, Shelved), and Events section (System, Application, User)
page_0305.png: Area object General tab showing alarm historization settings — Historize active/unacknowledged/disabled alarm counter options with storage period and deadband fields, plus Aggregate Alarms and Shelve Alarms checkboxes at the bottom
page_0307.png: Lab 12 title page: Mixer100 process overview graphic showing a mixing tank with Level_001 (96.96 L, yellow alarm border priority 2), Temperature_001 (125.64°C), Agitator_001 (0.00 rpm), two inlet pumps/valves, and an outlet valve
page_0308_0.png: Edit Custom Properties dialog for LevelMeter — showing pre-existing properties: EngUnits, EngUnitsVisible, LabelVisible, PVRangeFullScaleMax, PVRangeFullScaleMin, PVVisible — before enabling AlarmBorder
page_0308_1.png: LevelMeter Wizard Options panel — showing Level type, Vertical orientation, with AlarmBorder set to True (highlighted in blue) and SymbolMode set to Advanced
page_0309_0.png: Edit Custom Properties dialog after enabling AlarmBorder — now showing additional alarm properties: AlarmIndicatorVisible, AlarmMostUrgentAcked, AlarmMostUrgentInAlarm, AlarmMostUrgentMode, AlarmMostUrgentSeverity, AlarmMostUrgentShelved
page_0309_1.png: AlarmMostUrgentShelved property editor — Boolean type, default value Me.PV.AlarmMostUrgentShelved, Public visibility, with description: 'Indicates if the most severe alarm is shelved'
page_0310.png: Runtime test of Alarm Border animations on Mixer100 — three-panel sequence showing Level_001 transitioning from red dashed border (low level 41.88) to yellow priority-2 border (84.32) to red priority-1 border (96.97)
page_0311.png: Line 1 runtime view showing ContentDisplay with four mixers (Mixer100-400) each displaying Alarm Border animations on their level sensors — Mixer100 yellow priority 2, Mixer200 red dashed border, Mixer300 yellow priority 2, Mixer400 red priority 1
page_0313.png: Alarm Aggregation Overview diagram — hierarchical tree showing Production → Line1/Line2 → Mixer100/200/300/400 with SA_AlarmSeverity widgets displaying Critical/High/Medium severity counts, Active/UnAcked counts, and Enable mode at each node
page_0314_0.png: IDE Object Editor — Content list under SgArea template showing AlarmSeverityLabels entry, with Add button (Ctrl+=) tooltip highlighted for creating a new Content symbol
page_0314_1.png: SgArea template Content list showing AlarmSeverityLabels and AlarmSeverityPanel entries — Duplicate button (Ctrl+D) tooltip highlighted on the toolbar
page_0315_0.png: Graphic editor canvas with SA_AlarmSeverity widget selected — showing Critical/High/Medium severity rows with colored icons, Mode selector, and placeholder counts — Assets tab open with 'severity' search showing SA_AlarmSeverity component
page_0315_1.png: SA_AlarmSeverity1 widget properties — Wizard Options showing Type: AlarmSeverityIndicator, IsAreaObject: True, ShelvedEnable: False, all four severity indicators enabled, Label: False, with Critical/High/Medium/Low severity icons visible on the canvas
page_0316_0.png: Content list in Object Editor showing AlarmSeverityLabels and AlarmSeverityPanel — AlarmSeverityPanel is selected with Duplicate tooltip visible, demonstrating the duplication step to create the AlarmPanel variant
page_0316_1.png: SA_AlarmSeverity1 widget reconfigured as AlarmPanel — Wizard Options showing Type: AlarmPanel, IsAreaObject: True, Label: True, LabelType: ObjectTagname, Background: True, AlarmBorder: True, with Critical/High/Medium severity rows and Mode/Active/UnAcked fields on canvas
page_0317_0.png: IDE Templates tree — $Mixer template expanded under Project showing child Agitator object, with Attributes tab active displaying Alarm.Condition attribute described as 'Mixer malfunction status'
page_0317_1.png: SA_AlarmSeverity widget pasted into $Mixer template — showing Critical/High/Medium severity rows with placeholder counts, Mode selector, and properties panel with IsAreaObject: False
page_0318_0.png: SA_AlarmSeverity widget configured for non-area object — Wizard Options showing Type: AlarmPanel, IsAreaObject: False, ShelvedEnable: False, CommandPanel: True, Label: True, LabelType: ObjectTagname, with severity icons on canvas
page_0318_1.png: Galaxy Browser — Instances tree with Production folder selected, showing AlarmSeverityLabels and AlarmSeverityPanel reusable components with their alarm severity display layouts
page_0319_0.png: Single SA_AlarmSeverity widget preview — showing Critical/High/Medium severity rows with colored icons, Mode dropdown, and placeholder count fields, selected on design canvas
page_0319_1.png: Alarm Aggregation Overview graphic in design mode — six SA_AlarmSeverity widgets arranged in a grid layout for Production/Line1/Line2/Mixer100-400, each showing severity levels, Mode selector, and Active/UnAcked count placeholders
page_0320_0.png: Tools palette with Connector tool highlighted — showing the full grid of drawing tools (Select, Line, Rectangle, Ellipse, Arc, Text, Group, etc.) with Connector tool active for drawing hierarchy lines between alarm widgets
page_0320_1.png: Complete alarm aggregation overview with connector lines drawn — hierarchical tree layout connecting Production → Line1/Line2 → Mixer100/200/300/400 with SA_AlarmSeverity widgets at each node showing severity counts and status
page_0320_2.png: Graphics editor Tools palette — classic toolbar showing Pointer (active), Line, Crosshair, Rectangle, Circle, Text, Eraser, Brush, Fill, Eyedropper, Crop, Rotate, Zoom, Undo/Redo tools for the graphic editor
